series_metadata.series_description: Files containing information relative to specific petitions or requests submitted to the agency. Information includes, initial petitions, correspondence to and from parties, investigation materials, requests for information, and case disposition information.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Unfair Labor Practice (ULP) Case documents will be destroyed one (1) year and forty-five (45) days for the date of case closure. The only documents excluded from destruction are the ULP initial charge, the Investigator''s Memorandum, and the Board Directive; they are maintained permanently by the agency. ULP Case audio files, cases with probable cause findings, or board opinions are retained permanently due to public inquiries and statistical data. Representation (REP) cases are retained permanently due to public inquires and statistical data. Mediation (MED) cases will be destroyed one (1) year and forty-five (45) days from the date of case closure. MED case Notice to Negotiate, Fact Finding Reports, Conciliation Awards, Board Directives, and Board Opinions are retained permanently due to public inquiries and statistical data. ULP, MED, REP cases appealed to reviewing court are retained permanently due to public inquiries and statistical data. ; Paper: Entire file is retained for one (1) year and forty-five (45) days after case closure, then destroy. ; Microform: ULP cases dating back further than 1995, destroyed in 2016., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper ; Microform: Trash
